top_signals.title: Oil Fluctuates as Hormuz Flows Continue
top_signals.summary: Oil swung in a narrow range as flows through the Strait of Hormuz persisted and OPEC+ signaled higher supplies. Bloomberg's Stephen Stapczynski reports. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
top_signals.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Taiwan Authorities Search Evergreen Marine Premises, Reports Say
top_signals.summary: Taipei prosecutors searched Evergreen Marine Corp.’s premises on Monday morning as part of a probe into suspected insider trading, according to multiple media reports.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
top_signals.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
top_signals.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Swiss franc, Japanese yen Rise as DeepSeek News Boosts Safe Havens
top_signals.summary: The Yen and Swiss Franc were stronger against the dollar as investors sought safe havens after Chinese start-up DeepSeek’s new AI model hit U.S. tech stocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.summary: Welcome back to the City AM liveblog. Markets are dealing with a double dose of pressures to start of the new week as investors brace for a crucial earnings season in the artificial sector, whilst an increase of supply on the oil market weighs on prices. Over in Asia, stock markets slipped following a week [...]

top_signals.title: Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat
top_signals.summary: Arabica coffee prices hit a record level, as traders digested the withdrawal of President Trump’s threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on Colombia.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Building-Products Distributor QXO Launches Hostile Bid for Beacon
top_signals.summary: QXO is taking its offer directly to shareholders after being rebuffed on several occasions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: U.S. commercial crude oil inventories have decreased in June
top_signals.summary: For the week ending June 19, 2026, U.S. refineries processed 17.1 million barrels per day (b/d) of crude oil, down 81,000 b/d from the previous week, and they operated at 96.1% capacity utilization. Gasoline production averaged 9.5 million b/d, and distillate production increased to 5.2 million b/d.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

alerts.title: U.S. refining capacity decreased during 2025
alerts.summary: U.S. operable atmospheric distillation capacity, the primary measure of refinery capacity, totaled 18.2 million barrels per calendar day (b/cd) on January 1, 2026-down over 250,000 b/cd (about 1%) compared with January 1, 2025-according to our latest annual Refinery Capacity Report.
